ai_coach.headline: No telemetry, nutrition, or training data logged today -- adherence tracking is blind until you close the gap.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No sleep, HRV, resting HR, or body battery synced for today, so readiness can't be assessed. Treat tomorrow as a standard Zone 2 rest-day protocol until real data comes in.
action_plan: Log tonight's sleep and tomorrow morning's HRV/RHR as soon as your device syncs so readiness can be scored.
Enter today's meals retroactively (or note it was a miss) against the 2300 kcal / 215P / 200C / 66F target before midnight.
Log any gym session from today in Hevy -- 0/4 scheduled days are logged this cycle, so this gap needs closing tomorrow.
Set a phone reminder to log weight first thing tomorrow so the glide-path comparison has a real data point.
If tomorrow is a lifting day, confirm the session gets logged immediately post-workout, not end of day.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Today's Rest/Zone 2 target was 2300 kcal, 215g protein, 200g carbs, 66g fat, but nothing was logged -- log retroactively if possible, and prioritize hitting protein first thing tomorrow since it's the easiest macro to fall short on when logging lapses.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight logged today or in the recent history, so no comparison to the glide path toward 83.0 kg is possible -- get a weigh-in logged tomorrow morning to re-anchor the trend.
risk_flags: Zero telemetry, nutrition, and training data logged today -- adherence is completely unverifiable for this date.
Gym logging adherence is 0/4 scheduled days this cycle; if this continues, the Hevy PR and load-progression trail goes stale.
